subject: Project Management
title: The Kanban Method Principles
description: A quick win: understand The Kanban Method Principles.

hook.text: The Kanban Method has six core practices and four foundational principles.

buildup.text: Start with what you do now. Agree to pursue incremental change. Respect current roles.

discovery.text: Encourage leadership at every level — not just from managers, but from everyone on the team.

twist.text: Unlike Scrum, Kanban doesn't require a revolution. It's an overlay on your existing process.

climax.text: Kanban's gentleness is its adoption advantage — change without the trauma of transformation.

punchline.text: The quietest revolution is often the most lasting.

quiz.question: What is a core principle of the Kanban Method?
options: Start with what you do now and improve incrementally
Implement all six practices on day one
